*Student Profile Overview*
This C++ class encapsulates the essential data for an undergraduate university student, serving as a robust blueprint for academic record management.

*Core Attributes*
The structure includes a string for the complete legal name, an integer for a unique identifier code, and a double for the cumulative grade point average.

*Implementation Details*
Constructors and member functions are designed to initialize and modify these fields while ensuring data integrity and encapsulation principles.

*Usage Context*
Instances of this class can be utilized in student information systems to track academic progress and manage enrollment data efficiently.

Any other questions?
